tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with blue glaze finish, perfect for bathrooms and kitchen backsplashes

tiles.title: Carrara Marble Tile
tiles.description: Authentic Italian Carrara marble tile with natural white and grey veining, ideal for luxury flooring and wall applications

tiles.title: Slate Grey Porcelain Tile
tiles.description: High-density porcelain tile with a slate-effect matte finish, suitable for high-traffic floors and outdoor terraces

tiles.title: Terracotta Handmade Floor Tile
tiles.description: Traditional handcrafted terracotta tile with warm earthy tones and a rustic uneven surface texture, perfect for Mediterranean-style interiors

tiles.title: Subway White Ceramic Wall Tile
tiles.description: Classic beveled subway tile with glossy white finish, timeless choice for kitchen and bathroom walls

tiles.title: Black Basalt Stone Tile
tiles.description: Natural volcanic basalt tile with a honed finish and deep charcoal tone, ideal for feature walls and spa-style bathrooms

tiles.title: Moroccan Cement Encaustic Tile
tiles.description: Handcrafted cement encaustic tile featuring a traditional Moroccan geometric pattern in blue, white and terracotta, a bold decorative accent tile

tiles.title: Travertine Noce Floor Tile
tiles.description: Classic filled and honed travertine tile in warm walnut tones with natural pitting detail, perfect for elegant floors and feature walls

tiles.title: Hexagon White Mosaic Tile
tiles.description: Small-format white porcelain hexagon mosaic tile on mesh backing, a contemporary choice for bathroom floors and shower trays

tiles.title: Polished Concrete-Effect Porcelain Tile
tiles.description: Large-format polished porcelain tile mimicking industrial poured concrete, with subtle tonal variation and a sleek low-sheen surface finish
